metadata.title: AI Knowledge Atlas
metadata.description: Understand AI engineering, agents, RAG, LLMOps, and enterprise AI platforms through knowledge graphs and structured courses.

error.title: Page failed to load
error.description: Try again later. If the problem persists, contact the maintainer.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page may have been moved, deleted, or not created yet.

stats.description: Learning progress is persisted by the backend learning service.

hero.description: Track fast-moving AI engineering topics with runnable labs, knowledge graph context, and structured learning paths.

roadmap.title: Learning Map
roadmap.description: A layered path from concepts to production engineering, platform governance, and product-ready agent systems.

labs.title: Runnable Labs
labs.description: Labs verify key engineering claims from the radar and learning content. Draft labs become Verified after dependencies, CI, screenshots, and last-run evidence are complete.
labs.metadataNote: This page owns routing and rendering only. Lab metadata is provided by the backend learning service.

compare.title: Technology Selection Map
compare.description: Scenario-driven technology comparisons: a one-line conclusion, capability matrix, when to use and when not to, cost, and a decision tree — each linked to a runnable lab.
